title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.563 - Law applicable to breach of new motor vehicles warranties
text:
407.563.  Law applicable to breach of new motor vehicles warranties. — The provisions of sections 400.2-602 to 400.2-609 shall not apply to sales of new motor vehicles and such sales shall be governed by the provisions of sections 407.560 to 407.579.
(L. 1984 H.B. 992 § 2)
